testflight_internal.description: Archive yomy, export an IPA, and upload to TestFlight for internal testing. Build number is auto-managed by the Xcode Run Script phase (git commit count).

steps.name: validate_version
steps.run: if [ -z "$VERSION" ]; then echo "VERSION is required (e.g. asc workflow run testflight_internal VERSION:1.0)" >&2; exit 1; fi

testflight_external.description: Archive yomy, export an IPA, upload to TestFlight, attach to an External Beta Group, and submit for Beta App Review. Pass GROUP:<name|id>. Pass SUBMIT_BETA:false to skip review submission for subsequent builds of an already-approved version.

steps.name: validate_inputs
steps.run: if [ -z "$VERSION" ]; then echo "VERSION is required (e.g. VERSION:1.0)" >&2; exit 1; fi; if [ -z "$GROUP" ]; then echo "GROUP is required (External Beta Group name or ID; e.g. GROUP:'Public Beta')" >&2; exit 1; fi

steps.name: publish
steps.run: SUBMIT_FLAGS=""; if [ "$SUBMIT_BETA" = "true" ]; then SUBMIT_FLAGS="--submit --confirm"; fi; asc publish testflight --app "$APP_ID" --ipa ${steps.export.IPA_PATH} --group "$GROUP" --wait $SUBMIT_FLAGS --output json
